zh.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的女兒，於1255年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓。她於1291年與Sir Hugh de Bannister在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1339年在英國英格蘭享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的女儿，于1255年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓。她于1291年与Sir Hugh de Bannister在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1339年在英国英格兰享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: MOLYNEUX
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX was born in 1255, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard Molyneux of Melling and Emma Donne of Utkinton. She married Sir Hugh de Bannister in 1291, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1339, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX est née en 1255, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Richard Molyneux of Melling et Emma Donne of Utkinton. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh de Bannister en 1291, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1339, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX wurde 1255 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Richard Molyneux of Melling und Emma Donne of Utkinton geboren. Sie hat 1291 in England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh de Bannister geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1339 im Alter von 84 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX è nata il nel 1255 nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Lei sposato Sir Hugh de Bannister nel 1291, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1339, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUXは1255年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでRichard Molyneux of MellingとEmma Donne of Utkintonの娘として生まれた。1291年にイギリスイギリスでSir Hugh de Bannisterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1339年にイギリスイギリスで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX(은)는 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Richard Molyneux of Melling(와)과 Emma Donne of Utkinton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1291년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Hugh de Bannister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 영국 잉글랜드에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX nasceu em 1255, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh de Bannister em 1291, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1339, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX родилась в 1255 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Richard Molyneux of Melling и Emma Donne of Utkinton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh de Bannister в 1291 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1339 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes DE MOLYNEUX nació en 1255, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Richard Molyneux of Melling y Emma Donne of Utkinton. Se casó con Sir Hugh de Bannister en 1291, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1339, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 84 años.
